gate: W==D 96.9/89.0 tok/s LOOKED like 94% of owned, but DEBUG=2 route attribution: owned_flash_tile_gqa_whole fired (AMDGCN_TILE=1 precedence), NOT flash_block_tiled. With AMDGCN_TILE=0 it falls back to gqa_coop_vec. The block-tile route is NOT route-bound in the model W==D path.
why: candidate cannot be W==D-evaluated: route not bound -> the move is unobservable. PRIMITIVE_PLACEMENT_BUG (primitive exists, not route-bound). Impugns transfer_snapshot block_tile W==D (session-reported, never truly route-bound).

gate: route_bound+token_match; W==D 7.6/7.0 tok/s vs base 35.0/6.7 -> CRATERS ctx512 (4.6x worse), ctx4096 within noise. more splits=more combine tax
why: split-count knob is the wrong lever for split_kv_combine; combine tax dominates (worse at short ctx). topology axis exhausted (S=48 base, 64 tooling-bug, 96 refuted)

gate: route_bound+token_match; W==D 35.0/6.7 IDENTICAL to base -> no move
why: gmax dispatch is ~us, negligible vs ~149ms/token@ctx4096; the real combine cost is the hxdxS reduce + partial-buffer round-trips, not the gmax. P5-as-gmax-fusion is the wrong target.

gate: route_bound+token_match; W==D 22.9/3.8 vs base 35.0/6.7 -> WORSE despite ~2x occupancy
why: OCCUPANCY IS NOT THE BOUND. Lower vgpr (40<owned 64) gave lower W==D. The 8-wide unroll helps in-model (ILP/latency hiding), not just isolated -> NOT isolated-overfit. The tile is scheduling/latency-bound, not occupancy-bound.

gate: route_bound+token_match; W==D 22.2/3.8 vs base 35.0/6.7 -> WORSE (= no-unroll level)
why: splitting the token loop pipelines the reduces but BREAKS the unroll interleaving + adds an LDS score round-trip; lands at no-unroll perf. The tile is NOT reduce-stall-bound.
